title: サクラバクシンオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, today marks the start of Sakura Bakushin
O's run in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She will surely perform well. The reason for that
being...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm off to run 1,200 meters!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll show what world-class speed is like!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Accelerating straight off the bat and then
speeding up even more! Even as her trainer, my
eyes struggle to keep up with that speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hardly need to reassess her abilities on this
front. Her weapon of choice is, after all, her
immense speed. She's probably already the top of
her class among her peers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sprints are where speed reigns supreme, so
there's no doubt that she'll deliver great results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Baku...shin... Baku...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...She suddenly begins losing speed after she
passes the 1,200 meter mark. Although, this was
supposed to be practice for running sprints, so
she didn't have to keep going...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Baku... Huff, huff...
choice_data_list:
Were you trying to run over 1,200 meters just
now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... wheeze... Yes...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: My legs felt good today... so...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I thought... I might be able to... show you... a
perfect 2,400-meter run...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... I'm fine, I'm fine... My potential for growth is un-un-unlimi...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The moment the distance increases even a little,
her performance drops. It seems she really is best
suited for sprinting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training is over, I begin laying out an overall
plan to help her develop.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hello! The class representative is here! It's me,
Sakura Bakushin O!
choice_data_list: I don't remember calling for you...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no! Class representatives are great at
showing up before being asked!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With that, allow me to go through all the
formalities once more!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Observing etiquette is an important part of being
a class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
First off, let me congratulate my trainer for
attaining such a prestigious job!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're already overflowing with
enthusiasm about how best to make use of my
abounding excellence! Yes, that's for certain!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I wholeheartedly intend to continue to Bakushin
with your guidance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
We'll aspire to achieve an unprecedented,
earth-shattering applause for my dream!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That is, winning all the G1 races through sheer
speed! That's my goal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I've drawn up a plan! Here! Take a good look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hands me a carefully written one-year race
schedule.
choice_data_list:
You're going to take on all the G1 races in a
single year?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yep! That's about 30 races!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm class representative! I can succeed in
greatness where others have failed!
choice_data_list:
You can't participate in all the races in just one
year!

You can't participate in all the races in just one
year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how certain races can only be run during
certain periods and that there are different entry
requirements for each race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... So there are races like the Asahi Hai
Futurity Stakes and the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies
which you can only enter in your junior year?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And you can only shoot for the Triple Crown in
your classic year?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Interesting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's also got to consider things like distance
aptitude and issues with scheduling. Winning
every G1 race is absolutely impossible.
Therefore...
choice_data_list:
Shouldn't we narrow down what races you're
aiming for?

Shouldn't we narrow down what races you're
aiming for?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why would we need to do that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Trainer! You're not doubting my ability, are
you?
choice_data_list:
It's your duty as class representative to set a
reasonable schedule!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her it is her responsibility as class
representative to mark out an easy-to-understand
path for future Umamusume to follow.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You're right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
One of the class rep's jobs is to create a
comfortable environment for everyone to run in.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, I understand! Let's narrow down the
races!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bearing the crown of class representative, I can't
let anyone else take the Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So I'm going to enter the Satsuki Sho, the
Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll also go for the Arima Kinen! It's a competition
of the very best Umamusume after all, so I can't
NOT enter!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho might also be a good race to
enter. It can act like a shield. It's the perfect race
for guarding the seat of representative!
choice_data_list: Okay! Let's go with that plan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wooo! My path to glory is set!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to need your full support to achieve my
goals, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've decided on the path to
Bakushin... You could call it the "Bakushin Road"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
From this day forward, all my efforts will go
towards that journey! I'm going to Bakushin
straight for it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I can't wait! The day I lead everyone with my
exquisite quickness isn't far off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true, the greatest weapon in her arsenal is her
speed. But her proposed schedule focuses on
stamina—it doesn't make use of her talent at all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, the Kikuka
Sho, the Tenno Sho, and finally the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait! This class representative is
definitely going for the HUGE BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No amount of explaining would be enough to
convince her, though. I have no choice but to
skillfully and carefully guide her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I'll take her future into my hands, as her
trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Sakura Bakushin O begins daily training in
pursuit of her noble dream.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!
